title: M&SENSE Natural Soy Wax, Fireside Flurries Scented Small Room Candle Gift for Women and Men - 260g | 50 Hours Burn Time, Black Brown Gradient |Luxury Home Scented and Home Décor
features: 【Product Features】:Carefully blended with soy wax and high-melting-point palm oil, our candle offers a long-lasting fragrance experience of up to 55 hours. With a high-quality, lead-free cotton wick, it ensures a smoke-free and even burn, reducing soot and carbon buildup for a pure and lingering aroma

【Essential Oil Quality】: Infused with premium essential oils, our scented candle diffuses a fresh and natural scent steadily as it burns. Safe and non-toxic, it's free from paraffin, phthalates, and parabens, ensuring peace of mind for both gifting and personal use. For optimal fragrance, use in a moderately-sized space and avoid strong ventilation to maintain a concentrated and lasting scent

【Home Decor】: With its exquisite appearance and unique texture, this scented candle is more than just a source of fragrance; it's a companion for relaxation. The reusable vessel is both practical and aesthetically pleasing, making it an ideal decorative piece to enhance the ambiance of your home

【Gift Choice】:Its refined design and diverse fragrance options make it an ideal gift, suitable for a wide range of recipients. Whether for festive celebrations, birthday wishes, or everyday surprises, it brings warmth and joy to the lives of friends and family

【About M&Sense】: Since its establishment in 2009, M&Sense has been dedicated to crafting candles that combine quality with design. Using natural waxes and premium essential oils, our candles come in a variety of stylish designs to cater to a wide range of scent preferences, adding elegance and refinement to your living space
